docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF RUBEN MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEPHINE ENCARNACION. DEFENDANT INDICATES THAT THEY WERE SERVED AND READY TO PROCEED. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSEPHINE ENCARNACION FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, RUBEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,950.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, RUBEN AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, RUBEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50.(WIVED0 SERVED JUN-12-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2024 - JUDGMENT.
